visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with reddish-brown hair wearing a horizontal striped long-sleeve shirt stands center, gesturing energetically. To his right, a woman with dark hair in a cream-colored sweater smiles and holds a pamphlet. To his left stands a person wearing a large, smiling cartoon deity mask with a red shirt and olive-green pants. They are outdoors on a wooden platform surrounded by lush green trees and modern residential buildings in the background under natural daylight. The man holds up a transparent acrylic donation box with colorful graphics. (2) The camera provides a close-up view of the donation box, showing specific text and permit numbers clearly. Then it cuts back to the group where the man points to a large yellow text overlay on the screen while the masked character claps rhythmically. The woman remains smiling, looking directly at the camera. (3) The man continues to speak with high energy, pointing towards the camera and the box. Large colorful text overlays appear periodically at the bottom and middle of the frame. The background remains consistent with soft outdoor lighting. (4) In the final segment, the man leans closer to the camera for an emotional appeal, holding the donation box prominently. The trio wave and gesture together as more text overlays fill the screen, concluding the presentation in the same outdoor setting.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 好里家社福協會. (2) [Subtitle]: 開放小額捐款. (3) [Subtitle]: 勸募字號. (4) [Subtitle]: 電子發票愛心碼 5353. (5) [Subtitle]: 有鬆 有鬆. (6) [Subtitle]: 正式募集全台灣全國店家!. (7) [Subtitle]: 零錢箱小天使. (8) [Subtitle]: 歡迎底下填表格. (9) [Subtitle]: 恭喜!!. (10) [Subtitle]: 與夢想同在 有好里家在 <3.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator, 1 female co-host, and 1 person wearing a large cartoon mask.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A man in a black and white horizontal striped long-sleeve shirt with reddish-brown hair; a woman in a cream-colored knit sweater with dark hair tied back.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An outdoor wooden deck or boardwalk surrounded by green leafy trees and multi-story modern residential apartment buildings.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-arousal male voice delivering a rapid introductory speech with enthusiastic pitch variability. Underneath the vocals, a bright, upbeat electronic pop track with a consistent 128 BPM 4/4 beat provides energetic momentum. (2) A clear 'ding' sound effect cuts through the mix to highlight the mention of a fundraising permit number. The speaker's volume remains projected and assertive. A short burst of female laughter and cheering is heard in the background. (3) The male speaker emphasizes the code '5353' with rhythmic synchronization to the background music's percussion. A slight whoosh sound effect accompanies a visual cut as the tone shifts to an invitation for businesses. (4) The final segment features overlapping male and female voices cheering and delivering a closing slogan in a high-valence, joyful manner. The music swells slightly in volume during the last few seconds before fading out sharply.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To announce that the social welfare association has obtained a fundraising permit and is now recruiting businesses across Taiwan to host donation boxes.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video focuses entirely on promoting the charity association and its donation program.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The presence of a masked deity character adds a local cultural and humorous element to the social good message.
